title: Guyonia seretii
taxonomy: Guyonia seretii is classified in the family Apocynaceae. This family consists of flowering plants commonly known as dogbane or oleander. The genus Guyonia is part of the tribe Oxillae. Guyonia seretii is a species of flowering plant native to tropical Africa. More research is needed to confirm its exact classification within the plant kingdom.
benefits: Guyonia seretii is a plant that has been studied for its potential health benefits.
